issue_summary: Prevent writing vectors twice during merging HNSW graphs
javadoc_before:
/**
   * Merges the segment vectors for all fields. This default implementation delegates to {@link
   * #mergeOneField}, passing a {@link KnnVectorsReader} that combines the vector values and ignores
   * deleted documents.
   */
javadoc_after:
/** * Merges the segment vectors for all fields using a two-phase strategy: * *
    *
  1. Phase 1: Merge flat vectors for all fields by calling {@link #mergeOneField(FieldInfo, * MergeState)}, collecting deferred work (runnables) for each field. *
  2. Phase 2: Execute the deferred runnables (e.g., HNSW graph construction) using the flat * vector data written in phase 1. *
*/
